description: HOME/DISCOVERY PAGE - This is the main home page (首页) of MoeKoeMusic, a macOS desktop music app with an ACG (Anime/Comic/Game) theme. LAYOUT STRUCTURE: 4-zone vertical layout — (1) Fixed top header bar with macOS traffic light controls (red/yellow/green), back/forward/refresh navigation buttons, centered nav tabs (首页/发现/音乐库 in hot pink #FF4081), right-side search bar with pink border and placeholder '搜索音乐、歌手、歌单、分享码', plus circular anime-style user avatar; (2) Hero/featured section showing a playlist header with square anime-style cover art (cat-girl on tropical beach) to the left, and to the right: large pink title '阿珏酱的歌单', metadata line (2016-09-16 | 阿珏), tags (ACG,BGM,日语), description text, and a pink '播放' (Play) button with three-dot menu; (3) Song list area with header '歌曲列表 (467)' in bold pink, a song search bar, batch operation checkbox, and a data table with columns: track number, song name (歌名), artist (歌手), album (专辑), duration (时间), each column header has sort arrows; (4) Fixed bottom player bar. COLOR SCHEME: Backgrounds are pure white (#FFFFFF); primary accent is bright magenta/pink (#FF4081) used for nav tabs, section headers, active states, progress bars, and interactive elements; secondary text is light gray (#999999); primary text is dark charcoal (#333333); quality badges include orange VIP and blue HQ tags. CARD STYLES: Song list rows are flat horizontal rows separated by thin lines, with the currently playing track highlighted with a pink accent line; no card borders — clean row-based layout with ~12px vertical padding. NAVIGATION: Three centered text tabs (首页/发现/音乐库) with pink active state; back/forward circular arrow buttons; search bar with rounded corners and pink border. PLAYER CONTROLS (Bottom Bar): Left section — small album art thumbnail + song title 'Yes! Precious Harmony!' + artist names; Center — previous, pause (active), next, lyrics (词), equalizer/waveform, heart/like, plus/add, share, repeat, queue/playlist icons; Right — speaker icon + horizontal volume slider (pink filled, gray empty); Top edge of player bar — thin pink progress bar spanning full width. SPACING: 16-24px margins from window edges; ~16px vertical spacing between sections; ~12px row padding in song list. TYPOGRAPHY: Section headers ~18px bold sans-serif (likely PingFang SC); song titles ~14px regular; artist/album text ~12px regular in gray; column headers ~12px with sort indicators. ICONOGRAPHY: Thin line-style icons in black/gray for player controls; music note icon for track numbers; sort arrows on column headers. BACKGROUND: Solid white with no gradients or decorative elements in main content. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Playlist header with cover art + metadata + tags + action buttons; sortable data table with VIP/HQ quality badges; persistent bottom player bar with full control set; anime-style cover art throughout.

USER PROFILE/PERSONAL CENTER PAGE - This shows the user's personal profile page (音乐库). LAYOUT STRUCTURE: 4-zone vertical layout — (1) Top header bar identical to other pages (macOS controls, nav tabs, search, avatar); (2) User profile banner — a dark gradient background shifting from deep maroon/burgundy on the left to dark grey/black on the right with a soft blurred abstract curved light shape in the center, containing: circular anime-style avatar (light brown hair, red eyes, winking), username '阿珏' in large white text with grey 'Lv.9' level badge and dark/ blue VIP badges, bio text '爱生活，爱自己，爱音乐！' in white, stats row (3 关注, 3 粉丝, 1 好友, 58 访问), male gender icon, dark rounded badges showing '1361小时19分钟 听歌时长' and '乐龄 13 年', and two dark grey rounded buttons '签到' and 'VIP'; (3) '我喜欢听' (My Favorite Songs) section with horizontal row of album art thumbnails; (4) Playlist/collection tabs area with tabs for 我创建的歌单 (My Created Playlists), 我收藏的歌单 (Collected Playlists), 专辑 (Albums), 歌手 (Artists), 好友 (Friends); (5) Grid of user-created playlist cards in 4-column layout. COLOR SCHEME: Banner uses dark gradient (maroon-to-black); profile text is white on dark background; level/VIP badges use grey and blue tones; main content area is pure white; accent color remains hot pink (#FF4081) for section headers and interactive elements. CARD STYLES: Playlist cards in the grid have white backgrounds, ~8-10px border radius, subtle light gray drop shadows, ~12px internal padding; each card shows square anime-style cover art, playlist title in black, and creator/metadata info. NAVIGATION: Same top header pattern; within the profile page, horizontal tabs switch between personal content categories. PLAYER CONTROLS: Same persistent bottom player bar with album art, track info, playback controls, and volume slider. SPACING: Banner extends full width; ~16px gaps between playlist cards; ~24px side margins. TYPOGRAPHY: Username ~20px bold white; bio ~14px regular white; stats ~12px white; playlist titles ~14px bold black. ICONOGRAPHY: User icon, music note, play count icons in pink; gender icon; level badge styling. BACKGROUND: Main content area is solid white; the banner uses an artistic dark gradient creating visual contrast and emphasis on the user profile. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Dark gradient profile banner with user stats/achievements; anime avatar with level/VIP system; listening time and account age badges; horizontal album art row for favorites; tabbed content organization within profile.

SEARCH RESULTS PAGE - Shows search results for '初音未来' (Hatsune Miku) with the '歌单' (Playlists) tab active. LAYOUT STRUCTURE: Standard 3-zone layout — (1) Top header bar with nav tabs, search bar pre-filled with '初音未来', user avatar; (2) Main content area with large '搜索结果' (Search Results) header in bold hot pink, followed by 4 filter tabs (单曲/Songs, 歌单/Playlists [active with pink underline], 专辑/Albums, 歌手/Artists), then a 4-column grid of playlist cards (2 rows visible, 8 cards total); (3) Fixed bottom player bar. COLOR SCHEME: White (#FFFFFF) background throughout; active tab has pink underline and pink text (#FF4081); inactive tabs in dark gray (#333333); card backgrounds white with light gray shadows. CARD STYLES: Rounded white rectangles with ~8-10px border radius, soft light gray drop shadow (offset down/right, ~2px blur), ~12px internal padding; each card contains: (a) Square rounded-corner anime-style cover image (~60% of card height), with a small speaker icon overlay on the first card marking it as '全景环绕/Surround Sound' playlist; (b) Bold black playlist title truncated with ellipsis; (c) Creator line with pink user icon + creator name; (d) Metadata rows with pink icons: music note + track count (e.g., '51首'), play icon + play count (e.g., '4119'), calendar icon + creation date (e.g., '2018-05-31'). HOVER STATE: Bottom-left card shows a large pink circular play button overlay centered on the cover image — clear call-to-action for direct playback. NAVIGATION: Category tabs switch between result types with pink underline active indicator. PLAYER CONTROLS: Same persistent bottom bar with album art, track info, full playback controls, volume slider with pink-filled track. SPACING: ~16px gaps between grid cards; ~24px side margins; ~16px vertical spacing between header, tabs, and grid. TYPOGRAPHY: '搜索结果' header ~22px bold pink; playlist titles ~14px bold black; creator names ~12px regular gray; metadata ~11px regular with pink icons. ICONOGRAPHY: Pink icons for metadata (music note, play triangle, calendar, user); speaker overlay icon for surround sound indicator. BACKGROUND: Solid white, no gradients. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Pink-underlined active tab for result type filtering; hover-triggered large pink circular play button overlay on cards; truncated titles with ellipsis; persistent metadata with pink icon indicators; surround sound feature badge.

DISCOVER PAGE - Japanese Music Playlists - Shows the '发现' (Discover) page with '语种' (Language) > '日语' (Japanese) filter active, displaying curated Japanese music playlists. LAYOUT STRUCTURE: Standard 3-zone layout — (1) Top header bar with nav tabs (发现 is active/pink), search bar, avatar; (2) Main content area with: a two-row category filter system — top row has main categories (场景/Scene, 主题/Theme, 语种/Language [active with pink background pill], 风格/Style, 心情/Mood, 年代/Era), bottom row has language-specific sub-filters (国语/Mandarin, 英语/English, 粤语/Cantonese, 日语/Japanese [active with pink background], 韩语/Korean, 闽南语/Min Nan, 小语种/Minor Languages, 法语/French); then a 4-column grid of playlist cards (2 rows, 8 cards); (3) Fixed bottom player bar. COLOR SCHEME: White background; active filter pills have bright pink background (#F06292) with white text; inactive pills are light gray (#F5F5F5) with dark gray text (#666666); card shadows are subtle light gray. CARD STYLES: White rounded rectangles (~8-10px border radius), subtle drop shadows, ~12px padding; each card has square anime-style cover art (all featuring Japanese anime/manga character illustrations), bold black playlist title (truncated), creator info, and metadata with pink icons. Cards show anime themes: melancholic characters, Evangelion art, K-On! characters, purple-haired anime girls. NAVIGATION: Two-tier filter system — main categories as outlined pills, sub-filters as smaller pills below; active state uses filled pink pill vs outlined gray for inactive. PLAYER CONTROLS: Same persistent bottom bar — album art, 'Yes! Precious Harmony!' track info, full playback controls, volume slider. SPACING: ~8px between filter pills; ~16px between filter rows; ~16px card grid gaps; ~24px side margins. TYPOGRAPHY: Filter pills ~12px regular; card titles ~14px bold; subtitles/descriptions ~11px regular gray (some include emoji like (｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡). ICONOGRAPHY: Pink metadata icons consistent with other pages; no icons on filter pills (text-only). BACKGROUND: Solid white. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Two-tier hierarchical filter system with pink pill-shaped active states; curated anime-themed playlist cards; emoji in playlist descriptions; consistent pink accent color throughout.

MUSIC CHARTS PAGE - Shows the music ranking/charts view with two side-by-side chart panels. LAYOUT STRUCTURE: 4-zone layout — (1) Standard top header bar with nav, search, avatar; (2) Category filter section with two rows of pill-shaped buttons: filled pink buttons for prominent charts (新歌榜/New Songs, ACG新歌榜/ACG New Songs, 儿歌榜/Children's Songs, 台湾地区榜/Taiwan Region) and outlined gray buttons for additional charts (14 total covering genres like pop/electronic/rock/classical, regional charts, demographic charts like post-00s/90s/80s, and platform-specific like TOP500); (3) Main content — two side-by-side chart panels, each a card-style panel: Left panel is '新歌榜' (New Songs Chart) with blue square icon header, right panel is 'ACG新歌榜' (ACG New Songs Chart) with dark blue/black square icon header; each panel has a header section with colored icon, chart title, description text, and a circular play button (white background, pink play icon), followed by a song list with columns: rank number, square album art (~4px border radius), song title, artist name, duration; (4) Fixed bottom player bar. COLOR SCHEME: White background; prominent chart filter pills are filled pink (#F06292); inactive pills are light gray (#F5F5F5) with gray text; chart header icons use blue (#29B6F6) for New Songs and dark blue (#1A1A2E) for ACG chart; rank numbers 1-3 are pink (#F06292), ranks 4+ are gray (#999999); player bar progress bar is pink. CARD STYLES: Chart panels are rounded rectangles (~12px border radius) with subtle drop shadows (~2px blur, offset down 2px); song list items are plain rows with ~12px vertical padding, no card borders; album art thumbnails have ~4px border radius. NAVIGATION: Chart category pills at top for switching between different music rankings; circular play buttons on each chart header to play entire chart. PLAYER CONTROLS: Full persistent bottom bar — album art thumbnail, 'Yes! Precious Harmony!' track info (市道真央、伊藤美来、立花理香), previous/play/pause/next, lyrics (词), equalizer/waveform, heart, add, share, repeat, queue icons; right side has speaker + volume slider (pink filled, gray empty). SPACING: ~8px between filter pills; ~16px between filter rows and chart panels; ~24px gap between the two chart columns; ~24px side margins; ~12px row padding in song lists. TYPOGRAPHY: Chart titles ~18px bold; chart descriptions ~12px regular gray; song titles ~14px regular; artist names ~12px gray; rank numbers ~16px bold (pink for top 3, gray for rest); durations ~12px gray. ICONOGRAPHY: Square chart type icons with colored backgrounds and white text; line-style player control icons; music note for track numbers. BACKGROUND: Solid white, no gradients. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Two-column side-by-side chart comparison layout; color-coded rank numbers (pink top 3 vs gray rest); filled vs outlined pill buttons for chart prominence hierarchy; chart header with icon + title + description + play button pattern; side-by-side panel comparison UI.

SETTINGS PAGE (Interface Settings) - Shows the MoeKoeMusic settings page with the '界面' (Interface) category selected. LAYOUT STRUCTURE: 4-zone layout with sidebar — (1) Standard top header bar with macOS controls, nav tabs (首页/发现/音乐库 in pink), search bar, avatar; (2) LEFT SIDEBAR: Fixed vertical settings menu with icon + label pairs — 🎨 界面/Interface [ACTIVE, with light pastel pink #FCE4EC background highlight], 🔊 声音/Sound, 🎵 歌词/Lyrics, 🧩 插件/Plugins, ⚙️ 系统/System; (3) MAIN CONTENT: Settings panel displaying '界面' (Interface) title, then 5 setting cards in a vertical list: (a) 语言/Language — icon (A/Z), current value '自动/Auto', right arrow for options; (b) 主色调/Primary Color — icon (paintbrush), current value '少女粉/Girly Pink', right arrow; (c) 外观/Appearance — icon (moon), current value '浅色/Light', right arrow; (d) 原生窗口装饰器/Native Window Decorator — icon (window), current value '关闭/Off', right arrow; (e) 字体设置/Font Settings — icon (A), current value '默认字体/Default Font', right arrow; below the cards: red '恢复出厂设置/Restore Factory Settings' button, copyright '© MoeKoe Music', version 'V1.5.0 - darwin'; (4) Fixed bottom player bar. COLOR SCHEME: White background throughout; active sidebar item has light pastel pink (#FCE4EC) background; settings icons are deep purple (#9C27B0); primary accent remains bright magenta-pink (#E91E90) for nav tabs, progress bar, active elements; reset button is bright red (#F44336); text is dark charcoal (#212121) for titles, gray (#757575) for secondary text. CARD STYLES: Settings cards are white rounded rectangles (~8px border radius) with subtle light gray drop shadows (offset down/right), ~16px internal padding; each card has: left icon in purple, label text in dark charcoal, current value in gray, right arrow chevron for navigation. NAVIGATION: Left sidebar acts as primary settings category navigation; each setting card is a clickable row that navigates to a detail/options page (indicated by right arrows). PLAYER CONTROLS: Same persistent bottom bar — album art, 'Yes! Precious Harmony!' by 市道真央、伊藤美来、立花理香, full playback controls (prev/play/pause/next/lyrics/equalizer/heart/add/share/repeat/queue), volume slider (pink filled, gray empty). SPACING: Sidebar width ~180px; ~12px gaps between setting cards; ~16px padding inside cards; ~24px margins in main content area. TYPOGRAPHY: Page title '界面' ~20px bold; setting labels ~14px medium weight dark charcoal; setting values ~14px regular gray; copyright/version text ~11px light gray. ICONOGRAPHY: Deep purple (#9C27B0) icons for settings categories — A/Z for language, paintbrush for color, moon for appearance, window for decorator, A for font; emoji icons in sidebar (🎨🔊🎵🧩⚙️). BACKGROUND: Solid white, no gradients. DISTINCTIVE PATTERNS: Left sidebar + right content settings layout; icon-value-arrow card pattern for settings; emoji sidebar icons; light pink active sidebar highlight; red destructive action button for factory reset; copyright and version footer.
